title: Hartia gracilis

intro: Hartia gracilis, also known as Hart's tongue fern, is a species of flowering plant in the family Aspleniaceae. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its potential health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant properties, which may help to reduce symptoms of arthritis and protect against cell damage.
